title: SAIL DSP – Young Professional – 48 Posts

basic_details.job_title: SAIL Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 48 Posts
basic_details.short_information: SAIL has published the DSP, ISP & ASP Young Professional Recruitment 2026 notification to fillup 48 Young Professional posts through SAIL. Apply online by June 06. Salary ₹70,000-1,40,000. Check eligibility, age limit, syllabus, selection process, important dates, and apply online link here.
basic_details.organization_name: Steel Authority of India Limited (SAIL) - Durgapur Steel Plant (DSP), IISCO Steel Plant (ISP) & Alloy Steels Plant (ASP); Maharatna Company
basic_details.post_name: Young Professional (YP-1, YP-2, YP-3) across Projects Division, Works Division, and Materials Management Division
basic_details.job_type: Fixed-term Contract for Service - purely temporary; does NOT create any right for regular appointment or employer-employee relationship
basic_details.application_mode: Online only - at www.sail.co.in (Careers) or http://sailcareers.com

selection_process: Application Scrutiny → Computer Based Test (CBT) / Aptitude / Psychometric Test (if applications exceed 5x requirement) → Personal Interview (CBT:Interview weightage 80:20)
how_to_apply: Eligible and interested candidates must apply online only through SAIL's official Careers website: www.sail.co.in (Careers) or http://sailcareers.com. No other mode of application is accepted. Candidates must first complete One-Time Registration (if new user) and then proceed to fill the application. Once all required details are entered and the application is confirmed, no editing will be allowed. After confirmation, candidates must pay the Registration & Processing Fee online, submit the application, and download the Registration Slip with Application ID.
seo_tags: Durgapur Steel Plant Steel Authority of India Young Professional Recruitment 2026
